mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as coach_name FROM experience e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON e.coach_id = c.id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
SELECT e.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as coach_name FROM experience e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON e.coach_id = c.id WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as coach_name FROM experience e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON e.coach_id = c.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as coach_name FROM experience e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach c ON e.coach_id = c.id WHERE e.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO experience (user_id, coach_id, title, content, image, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{coachId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{image}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE experience SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
